untranslatable_reason: Pattern detection (double bottom structure with two distinct bottom points, confirmation line identification, and comparative volume analysis on left vs right bottom) requires multi-bar pattern recognition not available in indicator-only ruleset. The signal requires identifying: (1) downtrend confirmation before pattern, (2) two specific bottom swing points, (3) resistance level between bottoms, and (4) relative volume comparison across pattern legs. These require structural pattern analysis beyond point-in-time indicators.
translation_notes: Entry approximated using crossover above pivot (resistance level proxy) with volume confirmation. Exit target set to +75% per cited average_rise_pct (represented as multiplier 1.75). Stop-loss estimated at 5% based on failure_rate_5pct. Actual implementation requires dedicated double-bottom pattern detector or multi-bar lookback logic not expressible in this indicator framework. Regime set to TRENDING_UP and RANGING as per target_regimes but downtrend confirmation before pattern cannot be expressed.
